variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 8676 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 8676 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 8676 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 33 017 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8676
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P903541 Air Filter, Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8676
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P903541 Air Filter, Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4276 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8676
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4276 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
